name: semanticmatter-autonomous-development
description: VS Code extension: a read-only observer and visualization control plane for quaat/autonomous-development workflow runs.

scripts.build: npm run build:libs && npm run build:ext
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:libs && npm run typecheck --workspace packages/vscode-extension
scripts.test: npm run verify:reference && npm run build:libs && npm run test --workspace packages/protocol && npm run test --workspace packages/core
scripts.test:integration: npm run build:libs && npm run test:integration --workspace packages/vscode-extension
scripts.package: npm run build:libs && npm run package --workspace packages/vscode-extension
